case_title: QI REN LI VS. LINDA YE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, QI REN AS TO DEFENDANT YE, LINDA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,875.00 FILED BY LI, QI REN AS TO DEFENDANT YE, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, QI REN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YE, LINDA $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
